lines: Replay: Checked-in history does not support calling this proposal a replay: 22 nonfailure anchor(s) offset the currently available failure analogs (1 remain cautionary).
Main contradiction: A clinically credible schizophrenia program demonstrates benefit from sustained net DRD2 activation in the same use case.
Risk: high | Historically important target class but broad mechanistic baggage and limited disease-modifying evidence.
Risk: high | Class baggage around tolerability and limited disease modification remains substantial.
